column1: # DaemonLink partition table — fork of huge_app.csv
# Adds a dedicated `littlefs` data partition (label != "spiffs") so our
# DaemonLink_FS module mounts LittleFS on it without disturbing Marauder's
# SPIFFS-backed settings store. Both partitions use SubType=spiffs because
# that is the generic "data" subtype on ESP32; ESP-IDF discriminates by
